---
title: "Erick J. Corro"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/erick.png){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:erick.corro@posgrado.ecologia.edu.mx)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**PhD (2022)**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Biotic interactions]{.profile-tag} [Statistics]{.profile-tag} [Spatial patterns]{.profile-tag}

Biologist graduated from the Benemérita Universidad Autónoma de Puebla, with a Master's and PhD from Instituto de Ecología A.C. Currently a professor at Universidad Veracruzana, Córdoba campus. His academic interests involve the study of ecological interactions (mutualisms and antagonisms) between plants and animals, using interaction networks, landscape ecology, and macroecology.

### Education

- **PhD** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (2022)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
